title: In India's Dreamy Land
content:
In India's land one listens aghast
    To the people who scream and bawl;
    For each caste yells at a lower caste,
    And the Britisher yells at them all.
meaning:
Ella Wheeler Wilcox's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "In India's Dreamy Land"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
